mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_chat_message ( order_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, is_read ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{read} )
mapper.select: SELECT cm.id AS messageId, cm.order_id AS orderId, sender.id AS senderId, sender.nickname AS senderName, sender.avatar_url AS senderAvatarUrl, receiver.id AS receiverId, receiver.nickname AS receiverName, receiver.avatar_url AS receiverAvatarUrl, cm.content, cm.is_read AS read, cm.create_time AS createdAt FROM t_chat_message cm JOIN u_user sender ON sender.id = cm.sender_id AND sender.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user receiver ON receiver.id = cm.receiver_id AND receiver.is_deleted = false WHERE cm.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY cm.create_time ASC
